message:
test(fwc): add 30 auth/history/child-bead tests for beads 1g7z0.27, 1g7z0.28

Auth dispatch: validation, credential store, status aggregation (8 tests)
History dispatch: default/filter/limit/since/not-found/structured (7 tests)
Child beads: lifecycle pin/rollout/status, config schema/doctor/get,
explain/simulate/preflight, invoke/batch/cancel (15 tests)

Covers beads: 1g7z0.27, 1g7z0.28, 1g7z0.8.1, 1g7z0.9.1,
1g7z0.10.2, 1g7z0.10.3, 1g7z0.10.4
